howItWorks.intro: This food truck profit calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Daily Profit
rules.formula: Profit = Revenue - Food Cost - Labor - Fuel - Other Expenses
rules.explanation: Gross revenue minus all variable daily costs gives your daily operating profit.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: How much can a food truck make per year?
faq.a: Successful food trucks gross $250,000-$500,000 annually. After all expenses, net profit is typically $50,000-$150,000.

faq.q: What is a good food cost percentage for a food truck?
faq.a: Target 28-32% food cost. Below 25% may signal quality issues, above 35% squeezes margins too thin.
